Usage: /gsd keys [list|add|remove|test|rotate|doctor]

  /gsd keys              Show key status dashboard
  /gsd keys list         List all configured keys
  /gsd keys add [id]     Add a key for a provider
  /gsd keys remove [id]  Remove a key
  /gsd keys test [id]    Validate key(s) with API call
  /gsd keys rotate [id]  Replace an existing key
  /gsd keys doctor       Health check all keys

Use /login to authenticate via OAuth with ChatGPT Plus/Pro (Codex).
The /login command handles the full browser flow.
